# create_api_access_request query

## 001_select_projects.sql

### SQLの概要

申請元Projectと呼び出し元の権限を確認するため、Projectを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `projects`
- `project_members`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `actor_principal_id` | `str` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `project_code` | `str` | no |
| `owner_principal_id` | `str` | no |

### 条件

- `JOIN ON pm.project_id = p.project_id AND pm.member_principal_id = @actor_principal_id`
- `WHERE p.project_id = @project_id AND (p.owner_principal_id = @actor_principal_id OR pm.member_role IN ('OWNER', 'ADMIN'))`


## 002_select_apis.sql

### SQLの概要

申請対象APIが利用申請可能か確認するため、API catalog情報を取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `apis`
- `api_gateway_stages`
- `api_cognito_scopes`
- `api_reviewers`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `api_stage_id` | `Any` | no |
| `api_id` | `UUID` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `api_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_code` | `str` | no |
| `name` | `str` | no |
| `visibility` | `str` | no |
| `api_stage_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `apigw_rest_api_id` | `str` | no |
| `apigw_stage_name` | `str` | no |
| `api_scope_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `scope_full_name` | `str` | no |
| `reviewer_principal_id` | `str` | no |

### 条件

- `JOIN ON s.api_stage_id = COALESCE(@api_stage_id, a.default_api_stage_id) AND s.api_id = a.api_id`
- `JOIN ON c.api_id = a.api_id`
- `JOIN ON r.api_id = a.api_id AND r.reviewer_role = 'PRIMARY'`
- `WHERE a.api_id = @api_id`


## 003_select_project_cognito_clients.sql

### SQLの概要

申請認証方式とProject client構成を照合するため、Project Cognito clientを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `project_cognito_clients`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project_cognito_client_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `client_type` | `str` | no |
| `cognito_user_pool_id` | `str` | no |
| `app_client_id` | `str` | no |
| `base_allowed_scopes` | `dict[str, Any]` | no |

### 条件

- `WHERE project_id = @project_id AND client_type IN ('PUBLIC_PKCE', 'CONFIDENTIAL_CLIENT_CREDENTIALS')`


## 004_select_subscriptions.sql

### SQLの概要

既に利用可能なAPIへの重複申請を防ぐため、active subscriptionを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `project_api_subscriptions`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_stage_id` | `UUID` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `subscription_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_stage_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `approved_auth_mode` | `str` | no |
| `approved_by` | `str` | no |
| `approved_at` | `datetime` | no |

### 条件

- `WHERE project_id = @project_id AND api_stage_id = @api_stage_id`


## 005_select_api_access_requests.sql

### SQLの概要

同一Project/APIの審査中申請を検出するため、利用申請を取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `api_access_requests`
- `api_access_reviews`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_stage_id` | `UUID` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `access_request_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_stage_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `requested_auth_mode` | `str` | no |
| `requested_by` | `str` | no |
| `requested_at` | `datetime` | no |

### 条件

- `WHERE ar.project_id = @project_id AND ar.api_stage_id = @api_stage_id AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM api_access_reviews AS rv WHERE rv.access_request_id = ar.access_request_id)`
